_readme: Sets of 'analogous' fields that should count as ONE progress unit (filling either satisfies the pair), scoped per process INSTANCE - two different Spin Coating steps in the same sequence are never merged into one unit by an alias group. Primary real scenario: sheet_experiment.py names rotation-speed fields differently depending on spinsteps - 'Rotation speed [rpm]' when spinsteps == 1, vs 'Rotation speed {n} [rpm]' when spinsteps > 1 - same concept, different key. '{n}' in field_pattern is a wildcard resolved against whatever fields are actually present on a given process instance. To add a new alias group: add an entry here, nothing in alias_config.py needs to change.

alias_groups.description: Rotation speed, single-step vs multi-step Spin Coating naming
Rotation time, single-step vs multi-step Spin Coating naming
Acceleration, single-step vs multi-step Spin Coating naming
